judge_thought:

2001: 7 wins

2003: 8 wins
2004: 7 wins
2005: 3 wins
2006: 5 wins
2007: 13 wins

The highest number of wins is 13 in the year 2007. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 2007 is correct.
